name: K Rush
body: Rush family continues to lift our lovely Lyla (and the rest of the Klops) up in prayer. Love you!

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Her incision site looks so good! And she is rocking that bow and her big smile to match! ❤️

name: Judy Nichols
body: Thank you, Lee. Saying a prayer for Lyla and for you. This prayer from Every Moment Holy resonated with me. In our grief and pain we cannot see God's purposes and doubt we will ever feel normal again. Praise God He has a better normal for us!

name: Natalie Rynard
body: She’s such a trooper and so are all of you! This is such good news, praying these good results stay the same🙏🏻. I love the pics u posted, I did the same when Taylor had her brain surgery last year. It felt good to put it out there, a healing of sorts….another piece that I was able to let go of….one more baby step closer to the “end”. The end of the nightmare we were all enduring. Mostly, the end of pain for my (29 yr old) baby girl. I’m still praying for all of you and I love to see the beautiful spirit that Lyla has. It’s no surprise though with u as her Dad. (Her Mom too of course, I just don’t know her as well as I know u!!). You are an amazing family❤️❤️

name: Suzanne Hale
body: I love this post and am praying with you for all of this. God is good. I love the picture. It will always be a reminder of what God has brought y'all through. I love y'all and continue to praise God for all He has done.

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Continued prayers for healing and peace for all of you.
